untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (Double Bottom identification), industry peer analysis, and fundamental analysis which cannot be expressed with price/technical indicators alone. The 'throwback completion' and 'rebound after throwback' conditions require candlestick pattern detection not available in indicator set. Entry condition 'Industry peers not continuing downward' requires cross-security comparative analysis outside scope of single-symbol indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated with trend confirmation (ADX_14 trending up as bull market proxy) and close above previous close (rebound signal). Original signal requires manual pattern confirmation and fundamental/peer analysis before entry. Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given pattern's 78% success rate in bull markets and 5% failure rate.
